tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Pau Gasol is one of the greatest European basketball players in history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won two NBA championships with the Los Angeles Lakers.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Gasol was a key player in Spain winning international tournaments.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Marc Gasol is one of the most skilled centers in modern basketball.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA championship with the Toronto Raptors in 2019.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Marc is the younger brother of Pau Gasol.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Ricky Rubio is known for his passing ability and playmaking skills.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He helped Spain win the 2019 FIBA World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Rubio started playing professional basketball at age 14.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Navarro was one of the most important players in Spanish basketball history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won several EuroLeague titles with FC Barcelona.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Navarro was famous for his unique floating shot called 'La Bomba'.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Sergio Llull is one of the most important players in Real Madrid basketball history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won multiple EuroLeague titles with Real Madrid.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Llull is known for clutch shooting and leadership.
